errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
errors.network: Network error. Please check your connection.
errors.notFound: The requested resource was not found.
errors.serverError: Server error. Please try again later.

notFound.heading: Page Not Found
notFound.description: The page you are looking for doesn't exist or has been moved.

home.description: Compare two code sources across token, AST, clone-type, metrics, and AI analysis dimensions, then move through a structured review workflow built for serious technical inspection.
home.featuresTitle: Everything you need for code analysis
home.featuresDescription: A complete React-powered analytical workspace backed by the real comparison engine, not mock data.
home.ctaDescription: Paste two snippets or upload files, ZIP projects, and spreadsheet rows to launch a complete similarity review in seconds.

features.title: Multi-Dimensional Similarity
features.description: Token, AST graph, text, and AI-driven comparison across all dimensions simultaneously.

features.title: Rich Metrics Dashboard
features.description: Lines of code, cyclomatic complexity, function count, and maintainability indicators.

features.title: AI-Powered Insights
features.description: Contextual reports and grounded follow-up chat built from the actual comparison output.

features.title: Clone-Type Detection
features.description: Classify exact, renamed, near-miss, reordered, and semantic clone types with clear labeling.

features.title: Fast & Reliable
features.description: Optimized pipeline with charting, graph generation, session history, and AI follow-up support.

features.title: File + ZIP + Excel
features.description: Analyze pasted snippets, uploaded source files, ZIP projects, or spreadsheet-derived code samples.

analytics.title: Analytics Dashboard
analytics.description: A comprehensive view of your activity and usage patterns on the platform.
analytics.noData: No data yet. Run an analysis to populate the dashboard.

history.pageDescription: Browse, search, reopen, rerun, export, or delete previous analysis sessions.
history.noAnalysesYet: Run your first analysis to populate the history dashboard.
history.adjustFilters: Try adjusting your filters or search query.
history.deleteDescription: Permanently delete analysis #{{id}}? This action cannot be undone.

errors.loadPreview: Unable to load the analysis preview.

chat.noContextDescription: Run or reopen an analysis first so the AI chat can ground its answers in real comparison data.
chat.pageDescription: Ask grounded follow-up questions about the current analysis result and receive context-aware answers.
